creator: mckusick@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to shamsher from comment #4)
I have not been able to reproduce this bug. If you can provide a script that will reproduce it, I will use it to track down the bug.

Other alternatives are to use ZFS as your filesystem. Or you could try running UFS/FFS without journaling. To disable journaling use this command on the unmounted filesystem: tunefs -j disable /dev/da0p9
